step.name: pin-scanner
step.action: Pin scanner to specific version + checksum; document upgrade procedure.

step.name: define-allow-deny
step.action: Enumerate allowed SPDX ids + denylisted ids; capture in YAML.

step.name: run-scan
step.action: Resolve transitive deps; run scanner; emit JSON SBOM.

step.name: evaluate
step.action: For each package: classify allowed/denied/unknown; collect denials.

step.name: gate
step.action: Verdict=fail if any denied (no approved exception). Block merge.
